vectors.name: http11-server-surface
vectors.description: HTTP/1.1 request parsing, framing, chunked transfer coding, and server response behavior.

vectors.name: hpack-dynamic-state
vectors.description: HPACK header block encoding, decoding, dynamic table state, and compression behavior.

vectors.name: http2-server-surface
vectors.description: HTTP/2 framing, settings, flow control, stream lifecycle, server push, and error handling.

vectors.name: websocket-core
vectors.description: RFC 6455 opening handshake, framing, masking, close handling, and server behavior.

vectors.name: websocket-permessage-deflate
vectors.description: permessage-deflate negotiation, RSV1 semantics, fragmented compression, and compressed payload handling.

vectors.name: http2-websocket-extended-connect
vectors.description: Extended CONNECT bootstrap and framed WebSocket data over an HTTP/2 stream.

vectors.name: tls13-package-subsystem
vectors.description: TLS 1.3 handshake messages, extensions, key schedule, certificate authentication, and subsystem behavior.

vectors.name: tls-alpn-negotiation
vectors.description: ALPN negotiation, mutual protocol selection, and no-overlap failure behavior for secure transports.

vectors.name: x509-path-validation
vectors.description: Certificate path building, SAN checks, name constraints, key usage, and basic constraints validation.

vectors.name: ocsp-revocation-validation
vectors.description: OCSP acquisition, freshness handling, cache reuse, and revoked certificate rejection behavior.

vectors.name: quic-packet-codec
vectors.description: Long-header, short-header, Retry, Version Negotiation, transport frames, and stateless reset vectors.

vectors.name: quic-tls-initial-vectors
vectors.description: Initial secret derivation, packet protection, key update, certificate verification, and handshake vectors.

vectors.name: quic-recovery
vectors.description: RTT tracking, ACK processing, PTO, congestion, and packet-threshold/time-threshold loss behavior.

vectors.name: http-connect-relay
vectors.description: CONNECT authority validation, tunnel lifecycle, bidirectional relay, and carrier-specific forwarding behavior.

vectors.name: http-trailer-fields
vectors.description: HTTP trailer framing, trailer delivery, and extension propagation across buffered request paths.

vectors.name: http-content-coding
vectors.description: Accept-Encoding negotiation, identity fallback, buffered response coding, and invalid encoding handling.

vectors.name: http3-server-surface
vectors.description: HTTP/3 control streams, request streams, settings handling, and server-side response behavior.

vectors.name: qpack-dynamic-state
vectors.description: QPACK encoder stream, decoder stream, dynamic table synchronization, and field section decoding.

vectors.name: http3-websocket-extended-connect
vectors.description: Extended CONNECT bootstrap and framed WebSocket data over an HTTP/3 request stream.
